1. SCOPE THE PURPOSE OF THIS STATEMENT OF WORK (SOW) IS TO DELINEATE IN GENERAL TERMS, THE OVERALL REQUIREMENTS OF THE H-60V MEDEVAC DESIGN AND INTEGRATION, INCLUDING THE INTEGRATION OF A NOSE MOUNTED FORWARD LOOKING INFRARED (FLIR) SYSTEM.

DEFENSE SYSTEMS AND SOLUTIONS IS TO DEVELOP A SEPARATE MWO FOR A NOSE MOUNTED FORWARD LOOKING INFRARED  SYSTEM AN EXTERNALLY INTEGRATED HOIST MOUNT INCLUDING THE HOIST BUMPER GUARD AND INTERIM MEDEVAC MISSION SUPPORT SYSTEM ON THE H60V.
NO COST SOW REV H-60V MEDEVAC UHPO
